trivia_bullets.text: THB original print only (no prior printings). As a Satyr Shaman it sits in Theros's red-creature ecology; satyrs are associated with Xenagos and the revel-drunk fringes of Theran society.
sources: MTG Wiki: Nyx via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: "Renata was mesmerized by the satyr's dance of gleeful indifference, of reckless grace and bright disaster." — Luphea of Setessa, Histories. Luphea is a recurring historian-narrator in THB. Renata of Setessa is identified as Nylea's chosen demigod; the satyr is a witnessed figure, not a named character.
Art by Mathias Kollros. Hot crimson-on-black palette consistent with his style across many MTG commissions.

Hipsters of the Coast cube review (March 2020) called it 'a cute little value two drop' ranked top-3 for Peasant/Pauper. Functions as sacrifice fodder with a 2-damage death trigger; sees Pioneer play in Jund/Rakdos sacrifice shells.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: THB Cube Review Red 2020-03
